CLAIM CLAIM DROP

The legendary character joining forces with the highest meme community in crypto

Ran at Crypto Banter is teaming up with Crash to get the Banter Fam up and running on the Base blockchain, Coinbase’s premier blockchain, with $MUNCHIES!

What better way to enjoy your munchies than with the biggest meme on base, $BRETT!?

The Banter Fam will have first dibs when it comes to claiming some $MUNCHIES. This time YOU will be the insiders.

CLAIM DROP

The first 5000 degens to claim their $MUNCHIES will share a pool of $100,000,000 $MUNCHIES, we will airdrop these before launch in August!

$BRETT Holders with more than 1000 $BRETT will earn double the airdrop rewards! How sweet is that!
